Q: 5.3
A: ### 5 Induction: Proving "FOR ALL ..." (pp. 55-70)
- **5.1 Ordinary Induction (p. 57)**
- **5.1.1 Sum of Powers of Integers (pp. 58-60)**
- **5.1.2 Induction Gone Wrong (pp. 61-62)**
- **5.2 Induction and Well-ordering (p. 63)**
- **5.3 Problems (pp. 64-70)**

Pick **one section** to dive into (for you: **5.3 Problems**), **or** do you want a **quick summary of the whole topic first** and then pick what you don’t understand?
